recommendations.title: Black Cat, White Cat
recommendations.overview: A small-time hustler makes a deal with a notorious gangster to whom he owes money: marry his teenage son to the latter's daughter. However, the young lovers are not as agreeable.

recommendations.title: Maradona by Kusturica
recommendations.overview: A documentary on Argentinean soccer star Diego Maradona, regarded by many as the world's greatest modern player.

recommendations.title: Underground

recommendations.title: When Father Was Away on Business
recommendations.overview: In a post-WWII Yugoslavia still under Stalinist rule in the 1950s, six-year-old Malik is oblivious as to why his father, Mehmed, has suddenly disappeared. In truth, Mehmed has been sent to a labor camp as punishment for acts of sexual indiscretion in

recommendations.title: Arizona Dream
recommendations.overview: Rebellious young Axel Blackmar gets caught up into the family car business when his cousin, Paul, coaxes him to come to Arizona to attend the wedding of their Uncle Leo. As Axel makes the decision to try selling Cadillacs with his family, he meets an

recommendations.title: Time of the Gypsies
recommendations.overview: Perhan is a gypsy teenager with telekinetic powers. A wealthy gypsy, Ahmed, visits the village and promises to get Perhan's sister the medical treatment she needs if they join him to Italy. Perhan soon discovers that Ahmed's business activities are i

recommendations.title: On the Milky Road
recommendations.overview: Spring in wartime. Each day a milkman crosses the frontline on a donkey, dodging bullets to bring his precious wares to the soldiers. Blessed with good fortune on his mission, loved by a beautiful villager, a peaceful future seems to await him… until

recommendations.title: Easy!
recommendations.overview: The life of a melancholy professor is turned upside down when he discovers that a rebellious teenager he is tutoring is actually his son.

recommendations.title: Tolkien
recommendations.overview: England, early 20th century. The future writer and philologist John Ronald Reuel Tolkien (1892-1973) and three of his schoolmates create a strong bond between them as they share the same passion for literature and art, a true fellowship that strength

recommendations.title: Meet Bill
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered bank executive mentors a teenage con artist and tries to make a career change as a doughnut merchant.
